name: slack2snipe
description: Sync billable Slack workspace members to Snipe-IT license seats

config_schema.label: Slack Bot Token
config_schema.hint: xoxb-... token from your Slack app. Required OAuth scopes: team:read, users:read, users:read.email

config_schema.label: Billing Plan Name
config_schema.hint: Optional. Included in the auto-resolved license name, e.g. "Business+" → "Slack Business+ (your-workspace)"

config_schema.label: Snipe-IT API Key
config_schema.hint: Admin → API Keys in your Snipe-IT instance

config_schema.label: Slack Webhook URL
config_schema.hint: Optional. Incoming webhook for sync notifications (separate from the bot token)
